title: Iran holds a public mourning ceremony for commanders killed by strikes.
summary_full: Thousands of people mourned in a state-sanctioned ceremony, as people in Tehran described deepening anxiety and fear as the war continued.
summary_public: Thousands of people mourned in a state-sanctioned ceremony, as people in Tehran described deepening anxiety and fear as the war continued.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: deepening anxiety and fear as the war continued
